chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜高盛策略师将标普500指数目标点位上调至8000点，受AI和盈利所推动；阿里员工十三薪并入年终奖
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

程一笑：可灵AI 3月ARR近5亿美元，较去年同期增长4倍

36氪获悉，在2026年第一季度业绩电话会上，快手科技创始人兼首席执行官程一笑表示，2026年3月，可灵AI年化收入运行率（ARR）近5亿美元，较去年3月的1亿美元增长4倍。程一笑表示，可灵AI一季度收入高速增长，主要来自B端企业客户API调用收入和P端付费会员订阅收入的双轮驱动。无论是用户数还是月均付费金额，可灵AI均实现了高速增长。从留存看，B端企业客户和P端付费会员均保持较好留存趋势，体现出可灵AI在专业创作场景中的技术和产品实力。

台积电CEO：今年全员平均分红奖金涨幅将超30%

针对员工近期在网络上对激励政策提出的疑虑，台积电总裁魏哲家向内部员工表示，今年全员平均分红奖金涨幅将超30%。作为全球人工智能产业链的核心企业，台积电在业绩大增的同时，进一步扩大员工激励力度。魏哲家此番表态也反映出，在人工智能产业迎来空前繁荣、企业营收大幅增长的大背景下，行业龙头企业面

chinese_news.title: 前两天，我们在亦庄听到了AI最真实的声音｜2026 AI Partner大会金句实录
chinese_news.summary:
当大模型API调用成本一年内骤降超过80%，百万Token仅需几分钱时，产业竞争便不再纠结于技术指标的高低，而是回归到最朴素的价值衡量——能否在实际场景中降本增效。行业的聚光灯，从实验室的榜单，转向了真实的生产线、医院诊室、物流仓库和城市管理后台。

2026年，谁能在复杂场景中解决真问题，谁才是这场变革的主角。

5月19日至20日，以“带着AI去前线”为主题的2026 AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会在北京经开区通明湖会展中心举办。大会由北京经开区管委会指导、36氪主办、国家信创园承办，设置9场圆桌对话、22场主题演讲以及一场别开生面的“世界咖啡”AI+产业对接会。60位国内领军企业代表齐聚一堂，13家带着真场景、真预算、真痛点的需求方与36家技术方面对面碰撞。

正如36氪CEO冯大刚在开场中所说：“大多数人走进通明湖会展中心，心里想的是同一件事——不是来听AI有多厉害，是来看看AI到底能不能用、怎么用、花多少钱用，能创造多大价值。”

一位参会企业代表感慨：“以前参加AI会议，大家还在讨论‘未来能

chinese_news.title: 经过华为、传音、拓竹历练，95后打造AI母婴界特斯拉｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，AI母婴智能硬件品牌珂迪Coddie（以下简称“Coddie”）完成天使轮融资，融资金额数千万元，由钟鼎资本投资，向阳资本担任独家财务顾问。

Coddie团队于2026年初组建，由95后连续创业者何鋡威创立。何鋡威毕业于德国慕尼黑工业大学，先后任职华为、传音控股、拓竹科技等全球化科技企业。技术负责人毕业于国内顶级高校计算机专业，曾就职半导体龙头上市公司，负责大疆与Insta360影像IC方案落地；后加入国家“小巨人”第三代半导体企业担任产品负责人，具备复杂产品研发的深厚技术背景，以及前沿方案的系统整合能力。

当前全球母婴家庭面临养育压力大、成本高、信息繁杂等核心痛点，而传统母婴产品仍停留在基础功能阶段，智能化程度不足、生态割裂，无法满足新一代家庭需求。事实上，母婴智能设备在全球已发展多年，智能喂养、发育监测和孕产科技也成为全球增速较快的核心品类。

“我们觉得AI来了，很多行业都要重做。育儿赛道过去拼营销、拼

chinese_news.title: 化险为夷的洛克王国，给所有长青游戏上了一课
chinese_news.summary:
文丨果脯

2026年5月21日，腾讯魔方工作室群开发的《洛克王国：世界》上线了S2赛季更新。这款基于13年经典IP、以精灵收集养成为核心的大世界游戏，在2026年3月底正式上线后迅速成为年度爆款。据官方数据，游戏上线9天用户量便突破3000万，全平台预约人数达6000万，DAU达到1300万。 

S2赛季上线前，这款产品更是被寄予厚望，腾讯方面称其“有望成为下一款长青产品”。此时，距离《三角洲行动》正式官宣跻身“长青游戏”，也才过去一个季度。 

出乎所有人意料的是，5月21日S2赛季更新后，事情迅速脱离了轨道。 

几天之内，玩家社区出现大量争议，游戏B站官方动态评论数一度突破百万。彼时，玩家发现游戏出现了大量未在版本公告中提及的修改内容，并且多个已于S1赛季修复的Bug重新出现。这套前所未有的重大运营失误，一度让玩家揣测《洛克王国：世界》的成功，令团队

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜男士美妆品牌「GREENLAB绿所」获宝顶创投战略投资，张耀东出任公司董事
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，无感化面部理容品牌「GREENLAB绿所」（以下简称“绿所”）近日宣布完成千万级新一轮融资，本轮由宝顶创投战略投资。融资完成后，宝顶创投创始合伙人张耀东将出任绿所公司董事，参与品牌战略、产品矩阵、渠道经营等方面的长期建设。

这也是继2025年完成Pre-A轮融资后，绿所在半年左右时间内再次获得外部资本加注。据了解，本轮资金将主要用于新品研发量产、品牌建设、渠道经营及组织能力提升等方面。

绿所是36氪持续关注的品牌，定位“无感化面部理容”，重点面向“精致懒”的年轻男性用户。所谓“无感化”，指的是用户在购买、使用和呈现效果上都尽量没有心理负担：产品要自然、方便、高效，不需要复杂技巧，也不希望被明显看出“化妆感”。

chinese_news.title: 硅谷AI一线观察：一人花掉50万美金Token背后的大厂焦虑
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨 邓咏仪

编辑｜张雨忻

硅谷持续了两个多月的Token-Maxxing（Token军备竞赛）焦虑，在Meta以一种戏谑的方式按下了休止符。

前情大家都知道了：2026年3月，为了鼓吹自己是一家“AI-Native”公司，Meta曾在内部上线了一个“Claudeonomics（Claude经济学）”榜单：员工消耗的Token越多，排名就越高；垫底的员工，有被裁的风险。

不过，当我们在4月末来到硅谷，Meta的朋友带来了故事的后续：榜单上线一个月后，第一名的员工将Token消耗刷到了近50万美金/月，折合近3000亿个Token。

不久后，Meta下架了这个榜单。至于下架原因，公司内没有明确说法，但员工猜测是因为“畸形竞争下消耗的token成本已远超Meta预期”。

2026年硅谷的开局，很焦虑，很魔幻。

“你要是半

chinese_news.title: 红杉、华兴投了「AI产品的大众点评」，我们与它的02年创始人聊了聊
chinese_news.summary:
文｜周鑫雨

编辑｜张雨忻

打开“观猹”，能看到一个完全不同于机构投资榜单所呈现出来的AI创业生态：

这里很少有动辄估值几亿美金的项目，活跃在社区中的，也常常不是有着名校、大厂背景的创业者，更多是普通的设计师、产品经理，甚至退休教师。

观猹。

“观猹”创始人仲泰告诉我：“这才是AI行业最真实的生态。”

商品标签陷性暗示争议，盒马致歉并下架整改

近日，盒马旗下一款“粉木耳”产品因标签设计涉嫌性暗示引发争议。图片显示，该产品名为“盒马菌菇星球贵妃粉耳”，产地为山东，产品标签右侧有一个女性侧面剪影，并配文“粉嘟嘟，蘑菇届萌新”。

有不少网友表示，该设计容易让人联想到低俗色情内容，涉嫌打擦边球，观感不适。据中新经纬，5月25日晚，盒马回应称，对于商品标签造成的不适，向广大网友和消费者郑重道歉。盒马表示，相关商品已在收到反馈后全部下架，并内部复盘和改进上架审核流程。盒马坚决反对展示和传递低俗不良信息，将持续加强商品品质和标签审核，

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $75,000 on or before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: May volatility ('Sold in May') paired with institutional ETF strength (BlackRock block sales absorbed) and tokenization wave momentum signal macro risk-on vs. risk-off turning point.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Bitcoin price shrugs off $1.3B BlackRock ETF block sale; Crypto IPOs $1T market forecast); Cointelegraph (Bitcoin risks 10% drop as month turns red)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates by at least 50 basis points by December 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Block (SQ) report Q3 2026 stablecoin Cash App transaction volume exceeding $5 billion annualized run rate?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Block Inc. investor Q3 2026 earnings report / investor presentation (official SEC filing or public earnings call transcript)

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Block kicks off Cash App's phased stablecoin rollout to nearly 60 million users; DTCC plans tokenized assets to Stellar)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Amazon's AI shopping technology (acquired/built) generate $500M+ in annualized revenue from third-party retailers by Q2 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Amazon Q2 2027 earnings report (10-Q filing) or investor relations disclosure on AWS/advertising segment revenue attribution
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Kate Spade signed as visible anchor customer; AI monetization via B2B licensing is nascent, but Amazon's scale and retail customer access (Whole Foods, third-party logistics) create hidden TAM that prediction markets haven't priced.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Amazon starts selling its AI shopping technology to other retailers with Kate Spade as first customer)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the ETH/BTC ratio rise above 0.10 at any point between June 1 and December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CME Ethereum/Bitcoin futures settlement; any major CEX ETH/BTC spot price tick above 0.10
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Tokenization wave (Stellar DTCC integration, MiCA EU adoption, Banca Sella clearance) favors Ethereum smart contract ecosystem; crypto IPO/institutional adoption thesis tilts toward utility-heavy chains.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (BIS tokenization project; DTCC Stellar integration; Banca Sella MiCA clearance; Crypto IPOs $1T market); Chinese news (Kuaishou Keling AI ARR at $500M annualized—signals AI token compute demand)

market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Robinhood Q3 2026 earnings report (SEC 10-Q or investor presentation) with breakdown of new account drivers

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (Robinhood is letting AI trade for you so you don't have to keep checking the markets)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will any crypto exchange (CEX or DEX aggregator) be sanctioned or significantly restricted by UK/EU regulators for Russia-linked activity by August 31, 2026?

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC and short DXY on dovish Fed pivot signal + geopolitical Hormuz premium stabilization = mean reversion of oil-to-crypto correlation into risk-on equity tape.
supporting_signals: CNBC: White House denies Iran Hormuz closure (de-risks oil shock); Republicans battling inflation narrative suggests Fed may tolerate looser policy
36Kr: Goldman raises SPX target to 8k (AI/earnings tailwind); global AI Token-Maxxing competition signals risk-on liquidity environment
CoinDesk: Crypto IPOs $1T potential + institutional tokenization (DTCC, BIS) = macro re-rating of digital assets
investment_theses.counter_view: Sold-in-May seasonal pressure could override fundamentals; China growth weakness (Caixin PMI data if weak) could trigger DXY strength on flight-to-safety, killing risk-on thesis.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USD perps on Binance or FTX; hedge with short DXY (via DXY ETF or short USD/JPY carry)

investment_theses.thesis: Long healthcare/biotech (LLY, XBI) on consolidation super-cycle: Eli Lilly $4B vaccine M&A is harbinger of broader roll-up as AI-driven cost deflation enables smaller pharma buyouts.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Eli Lilly announces ~$4B vaccine acquisition spree; Dimon's $20B JPM acquisition appetite signals financial system liquidity for M&A
36Kr: Chinese biotech/healthcare AI startups (Keling, maternal health hardware) raising at scale → global convergence on digital health consolidation
Macro: Interest rates may ease (GOP inflation crisis) → lower cost of capital for deal financing
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory scrutiny (antitrust, JPM already largest bank) could slow deals; Eli Lilly's vaccine acquisition target may miss clinical endpoints, destroying acquisition value.
investment_theses.expression: Long XBI (SPDR S&P Biotech ETF) or LLY call spreads (Jun 2027 $600/$650 bull call); pair with short SMH (semis) to hedge correlation shock

investment_theses.thesis: Long USDC yield / stablecoin infrastructure on tokenization wave: Cash App rollout, DTCC/Stellar integration, Banca Sella MiCA clearance create institutional plumbing for USD stablecoin velocity.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Block's Cash App stablecoin phased rollout to 60M users; DTCC integrating Stellar; USDC/Ethereum liquidity protocols expanding (Aave, Compound stable-rate farming)
EU regulation: Banca Sella cleared for crypto services under MiCA → legal clarity removes tail risk for stablecoin custodians
Chinese news: Kuaishou Keling AI ARR $500M annualized → AI compute-on-demand favors fast settlement (stablecoins) over volatile collateral
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory clampdown on stablecoins (e.g., U.S. proposed stablecoin bills) could cap yields; negative carry if Fed raises rates mid-cycle.
investment_theses.expression: Long Aave USDC lending pools (6–8% APY) via Aave governance token (AAVE) or direct stablecoin LP on Curve (USDC/USDT); hedge with short duration Treasuries (TLT short or long DXY if inflation re-spikes)

investment_theses.thesis: Long AI compute tokens (HYPE Hyperliquid, XLM Stellar, NEAR) on institutional adoption wave: Goldman 8k SPX target + Meta/Google token-maxxing competition + DTCC tokenization = demand for efficient compute/settlement layers.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Crypto IPOs $1T market forecast; institutional disclosure standard push (Jefferies bullish)
Chinese news: 36Kr Token-Maxxing anxiety at Meta reflects big-tech recognition of compute bottleneck → Layer 1 infrastructure re-rating
Trending tokens: Hyperliquid (HYPE), Stellar (XLM), NEAR in crypto top 10 → retail/insider accumulation signal
Macro: AI energy demand (GPUs/data centers) driving compute token utility narrative
investment_theses.counter_view: Oversupply of L1s (Solana, Polygon, Arbitrum) commoditizes compute layers; regulatory clampdown on tokenization (e.g., U.S. prevents crypto IPOs) collapses thesis.
investment_theses.expression: Long HYPE/USDT or XLM/USDT spot on Binance or Kraken; take 30% profit at 2x; hedge with long BTC (reduces single-token risk)

investment_theses.thesis: Short-term tactical: Long May volatility / short June via crypto volatility ETF or ETH straddles; 'Sell in May' narrative colliding with institutional ETF inflows (BlackRock absorption) creates choppy mean-reversion setup.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Bitcoin risks 10% drop as May turns red (seasonal); BlackRock ETF block sales absorbed (no panic dump)
36Kr: Silicon Valley token-maxxing cooled by May (fatigue); Hacker News apathy on AI signals rotation risk
Macro: Fed uncertainty (inflation vs. growth) → volatility asymmetry favors short-dated option sellers
investment_theses.counter_view: May seasonality is overstated; strong June earnings (AI mega-caps) could reverse headwind into rally, stopping out short vol sellers.
investment_theses.expression: Short SPY May 31 calls / long SPY June 21 calls (call ratio spread); or short BTC implied vol (sell Jun 2026 $70k straddle, buy Jul 2026 $65k/$75k strangle) on derivatives exchange
